columns.name: SHRLGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND
columns.description: GPA Type Indicator. Valid values are: I - Institutional Course GPA, T - Transfer Course GPA, and O - Overall Course GPA.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_LEVL_CODE
columns.description: Level Code associated with GPA hours and calculations.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_GPA_HOURS
columns.description: Hours Used for GPA calculation for the level.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_QUALITY_POINTS
columns.description: Quality Points for the level. Calculated by multiplying credit hours of the course by quality points associated with the grade.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_GPA
columns.description: GPA for the level. Calculated by dividing GPA hours for the level into Quality points for the level.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Activtity Date. Specifies the date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_GPA_CALC
columns.description: This field is used to determine whether the gpa for a student needs to be recalculated or not. Y means the gpa is up to date and N means the student has had courses rolled to history and the gpa needs to be recalulated for them

columns.name: SHRLGPA_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SHRLGPA_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.
